ai_risk_assessment.interpretation: Embedding drift is within acceptable range (drift=0.0000, threshold=0.15) — no semantic shift detected in extracted facts. The extraction pipeline is producing semantically consistent output. Embedding method: lsa_fallback. All extraction records passed prompt schema validation — no invalid inputs reached the LLM. LLM schema violations remain stable at 0% — no prompt degradation detected. All output verdicts are valid (PASS/FAIL/WARN).

recommendations.title: Fix zero-variance confidence: extractor returning hard-coded default
recommendations.action: The extractor is emitting a constant confidence value (all values = 90.0). Verify the model scoring logic in the extraction pipeline and ensure per-fact confidence is computed rather than a static default.
recommendations.fix: Replace static `confidence = 0.9` with per-fact model logit score.

recommendations.title: Fix confidence scale: revert to 0.0–1.0 float range
recommendations.action: In the extraction pipeline (see scripts/inject_violation.py), change the confidence output to emit float values in [0.0, 1.0]. Current values are in [0, 100] which breaks week4 ranking weights by 100×.

recommendations.title: Fix zero-variance confidence: extractor returning hard-coded default

recommendations.fix: Replace static `confidence = 0.9` with per-fact model logit score.
